```

The caption mentions only one location, which is the "大魚神社の海中鳥居" (Oouo Shrine's floating torii gate) in Saga Prefecture, Japan. The full address of the location is derived from the name and the Google Maps API. The order of the location is determined by the order in which it is mentioned in the caption.

I hope this is helpful!
